name: UBA : Browsed to Scam/Questionable/Illegal Website
notes:
A user has accessed a URL which may indicate elevated security or legal risk.

References: 
    http://sitereview.bluecoat.com/categories.jsp
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%scam%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%questionable%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%illegal%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%hacking%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%copyright infringement%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%cheating%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%plagarism%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%child abuse%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%piracy%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%copyright concern%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%consumer protection%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%historical revisionism%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%criminal%' OR "Web Category" in (15, 80) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Browsed to Scam/Questionable/Illegal Website on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

AND when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%scam%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%questionable%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%illegal%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%hacking%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%copyright infringement%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%cheating%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%plagarism%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%child abuse%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%piracy%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%copyright concern%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%consumer protection%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%historical revisionism%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%criminal%' OR "Web Category" in (15, 80) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Browsed to Scam/Questionable/Illegal Website
